hero.subtitle: I create unique chibi mascot logos and branding for streamers, VTubers, and content creators who want to stand out.

section_titles.work_sub: A handful of recent mascot logos shipped to streamers, VTubers, and creators across the world.
section_titles.services_sub: Five core services tuned for streamers, VTubers, and digital creators ready to level up their brand.
section_titles.process_sub: Four calm, deliberate stages — from your first message to final delivery.
section_titles.testimonials_sub: 50+ five-star reviews from real Fiverr buyers across 18 countries — every quote below is verbatim from my Fiverr profile.
section_titles.pricing_sub: Simple, fixed pricing. Pick the tier that fits your launch and you're set.

services.title: Chibi Mascot Logo
services.desc: Custom anime chibi logo that represents your unique identity.

services.desc: Complete stream package with overlay, alerts, panels, and more.

services.desc: Full branding for VTubers including logo, screens, panels, and assets.

services.desc: Banners for YouTube, Twitter, Discord, and other platforms.

services.desc: Custom anime illustration for your stream or personal brand.

process.title: Brief
process.desc: You send me your ideas, references, and details.

process.title: Sketch
process.desc: I create a sketch concept based on your brief.

process.title: Color & Refine
process.desc: I color and refine the design until it's perfect.

process.title: Final Delivery
process.desc: You receive the final files in high quality.

testimonials.name: alex_hrmn
testimonials.quote: Thank you very much for your great work and the great service! Thegu understood quickly and was fast in executing. Also he showed a great sense of style. He was very service-oriented and helpful. The result is great and I'm very happy!

testimonials.name: tfiftyone
testimonials.quote: I'm so happy with the result, he worked with me until I was happy and satisfied with the result. He is a very great listener and the result came out way better than I expected. It's really worth the price. 5/5 stars. I recommend.

testimonials.name: admiralnguyenv
testimonials.quote: We were kept informed and updated on the progress of the design. Our feedback was listened to and we are super happy with the results. If you're looking for a logo with some chibi characters, I'd highly recommend this freelancer.

testimonials.name: tylerrushton619
testimonials.quote: Everything was exactly as expected thank you so much!! Looks crazy good thank you so much!

testimonials.name: richrawr
testimonials.quote: Patient, understanding, dedicated, and professional. He'll work with you until your idea is exactly the way you want it. Thanks for your work! 👊

testimonials.name: hiwaretro
testimonials.quote: Very fast delivery and excellent service! We ordered as a group of 11 and all were satisfied. I highly recommend this artist.

testimonials.name: bulbasprout
testimonials.quote: Quick and easy contact. Listened well to the suggestions and knew right away how to work out the idea. Multiple images sent to check if it was to my liking. Delivery was done before the date. 100% would recommend.

testimonials.name: zachcoco
testimonials.quote: Always a pleasure. Everything was perfect like always!

testimonials.name: kulutech
testimonials.quote: tdsign was great at communicating and keeping you updated on where he was in the process every step of the way. He made changes without any issues and most of all my artwork was brought to life — it looks amazing.

testimonials.name: mcfbfl
testimonials.quote: We made it work. The logo came out amazing. Will come back for more work to be done.

testimonials.name: marcanine
testimonials.quote: Really great artist. Takes direction well and nails it. A++++
